coat_colors: solid colors or parti-colors: black, liver, red, golden, and more

description.overview: Slightly larger than their American cousins, English Cockers are merry, active sporting dogs. They're excellent family companions known for their happy, wagging tails.
description.history: The English Cocker Spaniel originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being merry, affectionate, trainable.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their silky, medium-length with feathering coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Slightly larger than their American cousins, English Cockers are merry, active sporting dogs. They're excellent family companions known for their happy, wagging tails.
